headline: Occidental to Announce First Quarter Results Tuesday, May 5, 2026; Hold Conference Call Wednesday, May 6, 2026
summary: HOUSTON, April 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Occidental (NYSE: OXY) will announce its first quarter 2026 financial results after close of market on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, and will hold a conference call to discuss the results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, at 1 p.m. Eastern/12 p.m. Central. The conference call may be accessed by calling 1-866-871-6512 (international callers dial 1-412-317-5417) or via webcast at oxy.com/investors. Participants may pre-register for the conference call at https://dpregi

headline: Trump Says Iran Has Asked for a Cease-Fire. Oil Prices Are Falling.
summary: Oil prices were sliding on Wednesday after President Donald Trump said that Iran’s President had asked for a cease-fire, boosting investors’ hopes that the war in the Middle East could soon end.  Brent  crude international futures were down 1.8% at $102.06 a barrel in early trading, after falling below the $100 a barrel level earlier in the day for the first time since Friday.  West Texas Intermediate  U.S. futures were down 1.2% at $100.25 a barrel.

headline: Berkshire Adds OxyChem As Valuation Gap And Earnings Outlook Diverge
summary: Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK.A) has completed its acquisition of Occidental Petroleum's OxyChem subsidiary. The deal brings OxyChem's U.S. focused chemicals operations under Berkshire's umbrella. Occidental Petroleum plans to use proceeds to improve its balance sheet and concentrate on its core energy business. The move adds a large chemicals platform to NYSE:BRK.A, which already owns a mix of insurance, energy and industrial businesses. Chemicals often tie closely to broader manufacturing...
